name: gstack-studio
description: Visual desktop studio for gstack — discover, run, and monitor AI agents without touching the CLI

scripts.package: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.package:mac: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.package:win: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.package:linux: node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --linux --publish never
